summary:
This case describes classic findings for tension pneumothorax including unilateral diminished breath sounds and tracheal shift toward the opposite side. Immediate need for needle decompression due to life-threatening airway compromise from increased intrathoracic pressure.

Note that this summary does not include any information about pulse or blood pressure as they do not directly relate to the diagnosis being asked.
